entities.name: ZIMBABWE
entities.description: Semi-arid region where the study on farmer perceptions of climate change was conducted

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Fluctuations in climate patterns perceived by farmers as a major problem for agricultural productivity

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output which is reduced by climate variability

entities.name: FARMERS' PERCEPTIONS
entities.description: Local farmers' views and beliefs regarding climate risk and variability

entities.name: CLIMATE RISK
entities.description: The potential for adverse effects due to climate variability, influencing farm investments and decision-making

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY RESEARCH TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Research methods used to investigate farmers' perceptions of climate variability

entities.name: HISTORICAL CLIMATIC DATA
entities.description: Long-term weather records used to verify farmers' perceptions of climate change

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINFALL PATTERNS
entities.description: Unpredictable rainfall patterns perceived by farmers as a sign of climate change

entities.name: DECREASED RAINFALL
entities.description: Reduction in rainfall amounts perceived by farmers

entities.name: TEMPERATURE INCREASES
entities.description: Rise in temperature perceived by farmers and corroborated by climatic data

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY DECLINE
entities.description: Reduction in crop yields resulting from erratic rainfall and temperature increases

entities.name: LIVESTOCK MORBIDITY AND MORTALITY
entities.description: Increased sickness and death rates in livestock due to climatic changes

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Farm animals affected by temperature increases and climate variability

entities.name: RISK-AVERSION
entities.description: The tendency of farmers to avoid risks, perceiving most seasons as potentially poor

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shift in climate patterns that farmers seek to adapt to

entities.name: ADAPTATION STRATEGIES
entities.description: Methods implemented by farmers to enhance productivity in response to climate change and variability
